events.title: Wellness: Radiology Spring Health
events.comments:
Topic: Adjusting to Changes in the Workplace - Hybrid Meeting - Preferred in person for main campus teammates

An open dialogue session with our Spring Health partners to explore strategies to cope with the stress of transitions at work while continuing to grow professionally and personally. These sessions are offered as a hybrid session, both online and in-person, though they are not recorded due to the personal nature of the dialogue.

events.title: Grand Rounds: Dr. Gary Schooler
events.comments:
Title: AI-Enabled Precision Imaging in Pediatric Liver Tumors

Objectives
1. Briefly review the core concepts of precision imaging, radiomics, and foundation models.
2. Share our team’s research focused on developing and applying AI and radiomics-based tools in patients with hepatoblastoma, with the goal of enabling more personalized cancer care.

events.title: Professional Division Meeting: Rad/Fluoro & US
events.comments: Led by division leaders - Combined group

events.title: Grand Rounds: Dr. Diana Lindquist
events.comments:
Title: So you want to scan a mouse? Things to consider

Blurb: This presentation will discuss mouse MRI research and how it is similar to human research. The objectives of the presentation are to explain why one might want to scan a mouse, briefly introduce the regulations associated with animal work, describe the general work flow of an animal MRI, and provide some exemplary data from projects that have been done on our 7T small animal MRI.
